description.overview: This charming Dutch breed was used to lure ducks into traps. Their flowing coat and happy demeanor make them attractive companions and agility dogs.
description.history: The Nederlandse Kooikerhondje originated in Netherlands.
description.temperament: Known for being cheerful, alert, friendly.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their medium-length, slightly wavy coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: This charming Dutch breed was used to lure ducks into traps. Their flowing coat and happy demeanor make them attractive companions and agility dogs.
